memory:memory/2026-05-17.md:21:30.snippet: - **Pattern**: Happens after every code update that touches PnL check logic - **Prevention**: Always check stop loss condition as `pnl <= -stopLossPct` not `pnl <= stopLossPct` - **Last occurred**: 2026-05-17 (Apple-SOL closed at +0.02% PnL) ## Meridian Fix Applied (2026-05-17) - **Bug**: `currentPnlPct <= mgmtConfig.stopLossPct` (positive PnL也会trigger stop loss!) - **Fix**: `currentPnlPct <= -mgmtConfig.stopLossPct` (only triggers on actual loss) - **Files**: state.js line 432, index.js line 944 - **Root cause**: Apple-SOL closed at +0.02% PnL because condition was wrong (stopLossPct: 15, so condition was `0.02 <= 15` = true!) - **Do NOT apply**: minAgeBeforeTrailingTP 5min (user said NO)
